title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS company trusted by brands like The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its go-to-market engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration expertise, and a track record aligning Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR across globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Exceptional alignment across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS + Fintech expertise matches cloud cost management perfectly, Salesforce admin strength is core requirement, and proven ability to scale revenue operations at high-growth companies directly mirrors the $30M+ ARR scaling mandate.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations opening and immediately thought of you—the combination of your 15+ years scaling RevOps in high-growth B2B SaaS, deep Salesforce expertise, and fintech background seems like it was written for this role. With Finout scaling from enterprise customers like The New York Times and Wiz, they're at exactly the inflection point where a battle-tested Revenue Operations leader who's built the operational backbone across Sales, Marketing, Finance and distributed teams can become a real competitive advantage. Would be worth a conversation.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a leading revenue intelligence platform, seeks a Revenue Operations Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations to accelerate revenue growth through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. You'll partner with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions, redesign models for global scalability, and serve as a key partner providing dashboards and regional insights. Requires strong cross-functional collaboration and comfort navigating ambiguity in a fast-paced, high-growth environment. Salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Excellent match: RevOps Manager role directly aligns with Omri's target positions, territory strategy and pipeline forecasting are core strengths, and Gong's revenue intelligence platform is a natural fit for a senior B2B SaaS GTM executive. Remote/Tel Aviv location is perfect.
ai_opener: Omri here—15+ years building scalable GTM engines in B2B SaaS. I've spent significant time designing territory models that actually stick and building the RevOps infrastructure to make them work. Gong's revolution in revenue intelligence is exactly the kind of high-signal platform that transforms how Sales operates, and I'd love to explore how to scale your territory strategy across your global footprint.

title: Senior RevOps Processes Specialist
description: Remote, a global HR/employment platform, seeks a Senior RevOps Process Specialist to lead sales process improvements, streamline operations, and implement scalable solutions. You'll collaborate cross-functionally to improve integration between Salesforce and critical systems like HubSpot, LeanData, and Vitally, monitor process adoption and governance, document knowledge repositories for sales support, and maintain data integrity. Fully remote and async, reporting to the Manager of Revenue Operations Processes & Policies. Remote operates across 6 continents with all positions fully remote.
score_reason: Strong match for RevOps expertise with Salesforce/HubSpot integration focus and process optimization. Slightly lower than perfect due to reporting to Manager (not independent Head role) and HR/employment platform vs. fintech/AI-native focus, but excellent remote structure and global scale alignment.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building scalable RevOps engines in B2B SaaS, with deep hands-on experience integrating Salesforce, HubSpot, and data governance tools like LeanData. Your Remote role caught my eye because process standardization across distributed teams is exactly where I've driven the biggest GTM wins—and your async-first approach to 6-continent operations is precisely the kind of complexity I thrive in.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems
location: New York / SF / Salt Lake City (Hybrid) or Remote
description: Flex seeks a Revenue Operations Manager - Systems to build and own the Salesforce environment for its New Verticals division. Ideal for someone who thrives in ambiguity and has stood up RevOps infrastructure before, you'll architect the sales process from lead-to-close, design revenue tech stack integrations, and establish system architecture standards. Requires 5+ years in Revenue/Sales/GTM Operations with 2+ years senior, deep Salesforce configuration expertise, and familiarity with GTM tools like Outreach, LeanData, Clay, and HubSpot.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's core RevOps expertise, Salesforce depth, and proven ability to architect sales infrastructure from scratch. Remote option matches location preferences; only minor gap is lack of explicit Outreach/LeanData/Clay experience mentioned, though these are learnable for a senior operator.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Flex's Revenue Operations Manager opening for the New Verticals division and thought you'd be a natural fit given your track record building RevOps infrastructure from the ground up in B2B SaaS. The challenge of architecting Salesforce and the GTM tech stack for a new division aligns perfectly with the kind of high-leverage, ambiguity-driven work you thrive in. I'd love to explore whether this is the right moment for your next move.

title: GTM Engineer

You'll build, configure, and continuously improve these AI agents, working at the intersection of data, automation, and human workflows. The role focuses on how AI systems connect, run, learn, and improve over time within the GTM motion.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with GTM Engineer role combining RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS experience, and AI-native GTM focus. Remote location and facility management domain (enterprise, compliance-heavy) match Omri's background perfectly.

I've spent the last year immersed in how intelligent agents can transform Sales, Marketing, and CS workflows, and I'd love to explore how we could build something similar that compounds value across your facility management motion.

title: GTM Engineer

title: GTM Engineer

As Conveo scales rapidly, you'll replace patchwork SaaS tools and manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows — including lead scoring models that learn, attribution pipelines, onboarding flows that activate customers faster, and AI agents that eliminate hours of manual work weekly.

title: Head of Sales and Marketing (B2B SaaS)
description: This B2B SaaS leadership role (remote from Israel) owns both sales and marketing strategies spanning customer acquisition, revenue expansion, and retention. Requires 7–10+ years in B2B SaaS across both sales and marketing, deep SaaS metrics knowledge (ARR/MRR, CAC, LTV, NDR), and fluency in English and French. Fully remote with high autonomy.

title: Head of Sales (Mid-Market B2B)
